summary: Set 094 Session 1 — Form shrink + create-on-demand manifest lifecycle. Rebuilt the Getting Started webview form to two sections (Build project structure + Define modules (optional) with an Open modules.yaml button + SAVE copy); removed the old plan/session-set steps, the New-module button, and the parallel checkbox + worktree note (the underlying flows survive for Set 093's row actions + the palette). Added ensureModulesManifest — a shared create-if-absent primitive that writes the canonical MODULES_YAML_TEMPLATE on EXPLICIT user action only (adjudication A), backed by a cross-platform exclusive create (lstat no-follow precheck + O_EXCL wx) that never overwrites or follows an existing/invalid/symlinked manifest — wired into the scaffold (sole writer), the form's open-modules action, and the new dabbler.openModulesManifest toolbar command; Add-module now derives a created manifest from the same template. Re-derived the completion model to structureBuilt only, retiring the orphaned planPresent/sessionSetsPresent flags and the three dead payload probes (092 cleanup), and dropped the orphaned docs/session-sets/* watcher glob. The never-write-on-activation invariant is proven end-to-end at Layer 3 plus a structural source-level guard. Suite green across all three layers (pytest 2922/6, unit 1468, Playwright 26); cross-provider VERIFIED at round 3 (R1 Major test-completeness + R2 Major symlink-correctness both fixed).

reason.specifics: Session 2 is prose/docs/release-prep heavy (D6 copy-prompt command, parallel-UI shelving + escape hatch, docs pass, single-boundary release prep for Sets 091-094) with one routed architecture call — Fable right-sizes the model to that character (efficient on the prose volume, capable enough for the command + routed implementation) while retaining high effort for the release-boundary diligence. Routed recommendation saved raw in s1-next-orchestrator-analysis.json.
